title: Macaw's Aurora
description: This mod is a multi-compatibility for the mods developed by the Aurora Team. Whether it is Enhanced Mushrooms, Bayou Blues or Abundance
body:
This mod is a multi-compatibility for Macaw's Bridges/Fences/Roofs/Furnitures/Stairs and the mods created by Aurora Team. 
Whether it is Enhanced Mushrooms, Bayou Blues and Abundance.
The mod will automatically add bridges/roofs or fences with materials from other mods.

I had installed Macaw's Bridges - Aurora, I am afraid that by installing this mod it will delete all my bridges already placed.

Don't worry, this mod converts all the old blocks and items from the old compatibilitie.

This mod is a unoficial addons of macaw's mods, if mod will be crash and bug please report in this [issue](https://github.com/Samlegamer/Macaw-s-Addons/issues).

This mod supported :  

- Macaw's Bridges
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vPHgBokb/images/1eac984f041195ad21bdeec6ad165daa09b3d067.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vPHgBokb/images/1eac984f041195ad21bdeec6ad165daa09b3d067.png)
- Macaw's Roofs
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vPHgBokb/images/a6fac9cef4829377ad48902bea1e13f6fd7266d6.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vPHgBokb/images/a6fac9cef4829377ad48902bea1e13f6fd7266d6.png)
- Macaw's Fences
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vPHgBokb/images/e9c064ad047c6bcdb3532b339c94264a79b60124.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vPHgBokb/images/e9c064ad047c6bcdb3532b339c94264a79b60124.png)
- Macaw's Furnitures
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vPHgBokb/images/7f2f4488e6a858d9aeef3077b85c7d0c664bbb24.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vPHgBokb/images/7f2f4488e6a858d9aeef3077b85c7d0c664bbb24.png)
- Macaw's Stairs
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vPHgBokb/images/ac7afc3c7d18090bfa7802ac1a21c1338c7c808f.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vPHgBokb/images/ac7afc3c7d18090bfa7802ac1a21c1338c7c808f.png)

**_1.1 Update_**
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vPHgBokb/images/7211d26a1fe27a19331b78e87b4153ac9525a278.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vPHgBokb/images/7211d26a1fe27a19331b78e87b4153ac9525a278.png)

Required Depedency:

- [AddonsLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/addonslib)
- [Blueprint](https://modrinth.com/mod/blueprint)

Optional Dependency:

- [Macaw's Mods](https://modrinth.com/user/sketchmacaw)

Aurora Supports :

- [Enhanced Mushrooms](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhanced-mushrooms)
- [Bayou Blues](https://modrinth.com/mod/bayou-blues)
- [Abundance](https://modrinth.com/mod/abundance)
